sourceTitle: Generative AI Tool Guidance | Teaching @ JHU
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Although the benefits of generative AI tools in higher education are promising, approaching their implementation with care is necessary. Ethical considerations, such as bias detection and mitigation, should be addressed to ensure fairness and inclusivity.
